description: Design a 'Mini-Roundabout' intersection centered at (100, 100) in LibreCAD. Use layers 'ISLAND' (Green), 'ROADWAY' (White), and 'CENTERLINES' (Cyan). The design must feature a central island with a radius of 4 on the 'ISLAND' layer and an outer roadway with a radius of 12 on the 'ROADWAY' layer. Include four 8-unit wide approach legs extending North, South, East, and West on the 'ROADWAY' layer. Ensure the intersection is trimmed so the outer roadway and approach legs form a continuous boundary with corners filleted at a radius of 6. Save the completed design to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/roundabout_design.dxf.
